Now I will teach you Between.<[silence:60ms]>

Between is like space where two big rocks stand—one here, one there—but not the rocks, just the empty ground in middle.<[silence:60ms]> If you walk from fire to water, the steps not at fire, not at water are Between.<[silence:60ms]> When sun hides behind mountain but not yet gone, that time is Between light and dark.<[silence:60ms]> If you hold stick in both hands, the part not touched by hands is Between.<[silence:60ms]> Look:<[silence:80ms]> your shadow starts at feet, ends at head—the long black not feet, not head is Between.<[silence:60ms]>

Point where thing stops and next thing begins?<[silence:110ms]> That gap is Between.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you Between.

Between is like space where two big rocks stand—one here, one there—but not the rocks, just the empty ground in middle. If you walk from fire to water, the steps not at fire, not at water are Between. When sun hides behind mountain but not yet gone, that time is Between light and dark. If you hold stick in both hands, the part not touched by hands is Between. Look: your shadow starts at feet, ends at head—the long black not feet, not head is Between.

Point where thing stops and next thing begins? That gap is Between.
